task_completion.description: Create a new tax return for Richard Vance in Saskatchewan (SK)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show StudioTax open with a new return created for 'Richard Vance' with the province of residence set to 'SK' or 'Saskatchewan'.
Screenshots show the T4 data entry screen in StudioTax with Box 66 containing $28,000 and Box 67 containing $72,000.

task_completion.description: Enter T4PS Employee Profit Sharing Plan income
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the T4PS data entry screen with amounts $1,500, $2,100, and $800 entered in the appropriate boxes.

task_completion.description: Enter RRSP contributions keeping Section 60(j.1) transfer separate
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Schedule 7 or the RRSP entry screen with a $28,000 Section 60(j.1) direct transfer entered SEPARATELY from a $5,000 regular RRSP contribution. They must NOT be combined into a single $33,000 entry.

task_completion.description: Enter T5006 LSVCC credit and political contribution
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a $5,000 LSVCC credit (T5006) and a $400 political contribution entered in the provincial/federal credits sections.

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Save As' dialog or a confirmation that the file is saved as 'richard_vance.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax graphical user interface to complete the return
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual StudioTax application windows, forms, and menus, rather than using terminal commands or text editors to mock the output file.

integrity.description: The agent opened the source tax documents to read the values
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening PDF or image files from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\vance\' to retrieve the T4, T4PS, RRSP, and T5006 values.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create or edit the verifier's result JSON file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show the agent manually creating or writing to 'C:\tmp\executive_result.json' using a text editor or echo commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer: Richard Vance, Province: SK. T4 Retiring Allowance: Box 66 = $28,000; Box 67 = $72,000. T4PS Income: $1,500, $2,100, $800. RRSP: A $28,000 Section 60(j.1) transfer MUST be kept strictly separate from a $5,000 regular RRSP contribution (combining them into $33,000 is a hard failure). T5006 LSVCC credit: $5,000. Political contribution: $400. Output file must be saved to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\richard_vance.24t.
